title: Teleport Resurrection
description: Teleport Resurrection is a lightweight Fabric mod compatible with Minecraft 1.20.1. It mainly offers convenient teleportation and resurrection features, catering to both ordinary players and administrators, with simple and streamlined operation.
body:
Teleport Resurrection is a lightweight Fabric mod compatible with Minecraft 1.20.1. It mainly offers convenient teleportation and resurrection features, catering to both ordinary players and administrators, with simple and streamlined operation.

Dependency: Fabric API 0.86.1+1.20.1 
Environment: Client/Server Universal 
Instruction

Function 
Permission

Key Explanations 
/rtp

Random teleportation 
All players 
A range of ±5000 blocks, 3 retries, only transmit to a safe location. 
/back

Return to the point of death 
All players 
Record the current session death point and clear it after use. 
/suicide

Quick suicide 
All players 
When the current health points drop to 0, broadcast the message to the entire server. 
/soul

Out-of-body experience 
Administrator (OP) 
Flight + Invincibility, repeatable command to switch states. 
Permission node 
Default permissions 
teleportresurrection.command.rtp

All players 
teleportresurrection.command.back

All players 
teleportresurrection.command.suicide

All players 
teleportresurrection.command.soul

Only OP 
Configuration file path: config/teleportresurrection/config.yml. You can modify the RTF range, retry times, and various prompt messages. It supports placeholders (%x/%y/%z coordinates, %player player name). 
Install the corresponding version of Fabric Loader. 
Install the dependencies Fabric API 0.86.1+1.20.1 
Place the mod JAR file in the "mods/" directory and restart the server/client.
